<?php declare(strict_types=1); namespace Intervention\Image\Drivers\Imagick\Encoders; use Intervention\Image\Drivers\Imagick\Modifiers\StripMetaModifier; use Intervention\Image\EncodedImage; use Intervention\Image\Encoders\HeicEncoder as GenericHeicEncoder; use Intervention\Image\Interfaces\EncodedImageInterface; use Intervention\Image\Interfaces\ImageInterface; use Intervention\Image\Interfaces\SpecializedInterface; class HeicEncoder extends GenericHeicEncoder implements SpecializedInterface { public function encode(ImageInterface $image): EncodedImageInterface { $format = 'HEIC'; // strip meta data if ($this->strip || (is_null($this->strip) && $this->driver()->config()->strip)) { $image->modify(new StripMetaModifier()); } $imagick = $image->core()->native(); $imagick->setFormat($format); $imagick->setImageFormat($format); $imagick->setCompressionQuality($this->quality); $imagick->setImageCompressionQuality($this->quality); return new EncodedImage($imagick->getImagesBlob(), 'image/heic'); } }
